title: Research MeshCore app transport/API protocol subset
description: Why this exists: the adapter must be based on what MeshCore app clients and firmware actually speak locally, not assumptions from Meshtastic or LICHEN Native. What needs to be done: inspect MeshCore app/client and firmware sources for local transport choices, framing, binary/protobuf/JSON formats if any, BLE/serial behavior, pairing/session model, node identity/status/config/message flows, and unsupported operations. Acceptance criteria: source references and commit SHAs are recorded in Beads notes; mandatory vs optional app protocol elements are listed; differences from Meshtastic and LICHEN Native are explicit; any uncertainty creates follow-up Beads.
